name: Zoomrgy
description: A fully-featured, highly configurable zoom mod for Minecraft. Features ultra-smooth transitions (Smith Zoom) with adjustable speeds and customizable easing curves (Linear, Ease In, Ease Out, Ease In-Out, and Smoothstep). Control your zoom level dynamically using your scroll wheel, customize your preferences via the Mod Menu interface, and save your custom profiles automatically. Default keybind: C.
